name: sd_material_recipes
description: SD 材质配方系统：常见 PBR 材质的标准节点图搭建指南。 参考 substance-designer-mcp 的 79 个材质配方。 Use when AI needs to: (1) create PBR materials, (2) build material graphs, (3) follow best practices for material creation. Substance Designer only (run_python).
author: ArtClaw
